name: firetv
title: Fire TV Cast
description: Cast YouTube, Stremio, Disney+, Netflix, Prime Video, and HBO to Fire TV via Home Assistant
author: gtarraga

commands.name: cast-youtube
commands.title: Cast YouTube
commands.subtitle: Fire TV Cast
commands.description: Turn on Fire TV and projector, play YouTube in SmartTube

commands.name: cast-stremio
commands.title: Cast Stremio
commands.subtitle: Fire TV Cast
commands.description: Turn on Fire TV and projector, open movie or show in Stremio

commands.name: cast-disney
commands.title: Cast Disney+
commands.subtitle: Fire TV Cast
commands.description: Turn on Fire TV and projector, open show or movie in Disney+

commands.name: cast-netflix
commands.title: Cast Netflix
commands.subtitle: Fire TV Cast
commands.description: Turn on Fire TV and projector, open show or movie in Netflix

commands.name: cast-prime
commands.title: Cast Prime Video
commands.subtitle: Fire TV Cast
commands.description: Turn on Fire TV and projector, open show or movie in Prime Video

commands.name: cast-hbo
commands.title: Cast HBO
commands.subtitle: Fire TV Cast
commands.description: Turn on Fire TV and projector, open show or movie in HBO / Max

preferences.name: haUrl
preferences.title: Home Assistant URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your Home Assistant instance

preferences.name: haToken
preferences.title: Home Assistant Token
preferences.description: Long-lived access token from HA → Security

preferences.name: hasProjector
preferences.title: Projector Connected
preferences.description: Wake projector via Wake-on-LAN before casting
preferences.label: Projector Connected

preferences.name: projectorMac
preferences.title: Projector MAC Address
preferences.description: MAC address for Wake-on-LAN magic packet

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
